function.name: hasegawa_mima_linear_check_converge_N
function.description: Conduct a Hasegawa-Mima linear plasma turbulence simulation and evaluate spatial resolution convergence by comparing against analytical solution. Returns {"refined_parameter": str, "current_value": int, "RMSE": float, "is_converged": bool, "accumulated_cost": int, "The cost of the solver simulating the environment": int, "wall_time_exceeded": bool}.

N.description: Current grid resolution for spatial discretization

dt.description: Time step size for numerical integration
